body:
theeloquentlizard:

kissing women is incredible in a way i don’t know how to accurately convey; there’s just a truly unique softness to it all.

you know when you kiss a girl for the first time & it’s like a whole new experience, she feels like no one else ever could, so wholly different but perfect & incredible? it’s like the first time you ever experienced true wonder all over again.

the way a woman you’ve kissed a hundred times feels better every time. impossibly so. the way her lips mark everywhere they touch, the way you’ll feel her lips on you for the rest of the week & swoon just thinking about her.

anyway, i think women are cool & hot.
